features.name: Shader-aware pipeline selection
features.description: Forces Simple Clouds to use the shader-aware pipeline when shaders are active.
features.notes: Implemented through Simple Clouds renderer mixins.

features.name: Shader uniform bridge
features.description: Exposes cloud, weather, and storm-related values to supported shader integrations.
examples: Cloud and storm uniforms for supported shader packs

features.name: Iris weather provider bridge
features.description: Overrides rain, thunder, and sky darken inputs used by Iris-compatible shader uniforms.
examples: Localized rain and thunder values from Simple Clouds

features.name: Oculus sky bridge registration
features.description: Registers the Simple Clouds render target with the Oculus sky bridge when the API is present.

features.name: Cloud dimension whitelist
features.description: Lets support users restrict each cloud type to specific dimensions through a JSON file.

features.name: Unsupported shader warning
features.description: Warns users when they select a shader pack other than Atmospheric Shaders.

features.name: Experimental Distant Horizons depth integration
features.description: Includes shader-aware depth capture and merge logic for Distant Horizons.
features.notes: Repository docs still describe Distant Horizons support as experimental.
